REQUIRED_FIELDS.id: Announcement id. Dismissal is keyed to this — users who dismiss it never see it again UNLESS you use a new id. Editing text under the same id will NOT reach past dismissers. Convention: name-v1, name-v2.
REQUIRED_FIELDS.type: Banner color + icon. One of: 'info' (blue, neutral news), 'success' (green, good news), 'warning' (yellow, heads-up like maintenance), 'error' (red, something broken).
REQUIRED_FIELDS.message: The banner text. Plain string for all users, or per-language: {"en": "...", "es": "...", "fr": "...", "ja": "...", "pt": "..."}. Missing languages fall back to en.
REQUIRED_FIELDS.dismissible: true = user can close it (normal). false = stays until you remove it from this file — reserve for critical/outage notices, users resent banners they can't close.

CHARACTER_LIMITS.why: The banner is a slim toast at the top of the sidebar (~360px wide). Text wraps to multiple lines fine, but 1-2 lines reads best.
CHARACTER_LIMITS.message: Aim for ~90 chars EN (2 lines). Hard ceiling ~140. ES/PT/FR run 20-30% longer than EN — keep the EN version short and translations usually fit.

HOW_TO.publish: Edit this file, commit to main. GitHub caches ~5 min, users' extensions check hourly → visible to everyone within ~65 min. Already-open tabs get it too (no reload needed).
HOW_TO.take_down: Replace the ENTIRE file content with {} — the banner disappears for everyone within the hour.
HOW_TO.new_announcement: Change the id + message. New id = shows to everyone again, including users who dismissed the previous one.
HOW_TO.fix_typo_quietly: Edit message, KEEP the same id — only users who haven't dismissed it yet see the fix.

typical_uses.maintenance: type=warning, e.g. 'Scheduled maintenance July 20, 02:00-03:00 UTC. Cloud sync may pause briefly.'
typical_uses.new_update: type=success, e.g. 'v1.1 is live — chat export to PDF now available!'
typical_uses.known_issue: type=error + consider dismissible=false, e.g. 'Claude detection is temporarily affected. Fix is rolling out.'

message.en: Welcome to ChaturAI! Organise your AI chats across ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, and Claude — all in one place.
message.es: ¡Bienvenido a ChaturAI! Organiza tus chats de IA de ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok y Claude — todo en un solo lugar.
message.fr: Bienvenue sur ChaturAI ! Organisez vos conversations IA de ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok et Claude — au même endroit.
message.ja: ChaturAIへようこそ！ChatGPT、Gemini、Grok、Claude のAIチャットを一か所で整理できます。
message.pt: Bem-vindo ao ChaturAI! Organize seus chats de IA do ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok e Claude — tudo em um só lugar.
